channel.title: Sex Toys on Andreas Gajdosik
channel.description: Recent content in Sex Toys on Andreas Gajdosik

item.title: Love Your Nation
item.description:
Love Your Nation is an artwork thematizing the nationalism as a form of love of one’s own nation. What happens when the love exceedes the limits of control and overflows into a sexual desire towards own nation? How to deal with the sexual pressure in situations like quarantine when you cannot meet other fellow neo-nazis? The DIY national flag vagina is here to save you!

Návod na umělou vagínu z české vlajky // Instructions for homemade vagina made of the czech flag

Czech flag can be substituted with any other national flag.
